experts.rationale: Clean architectural separation: hotword extraction is an independent module with clear API boundary. Lazy jieba import is correct. Encoding fallback chain handles Chinese content well. No critical or major issues.
Code quality is solid: good docstrings, complete type hints, focused functions. All 18 tests pass. Minor issues are non-blocking (magic numbers, test import hack, resume path gap).

issues.description: Magic number 3 in topK=max_count*3 should be a named constant explaining over-capture ratio
sys.path.insert hack instead of standard package imports
Resume path skips hotword extraction; reference_docs changes between runs use stale hotwords
Chinese warning uses Unicode escapes — use raw Chinese characters for readability
